# uapi_mwan3_member (Resource)

Mwan3 member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_mwan3_member" "example" {
  interface = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Network interface this entry applies to.

### Optional

- `id` (String) Resource id. Set it at create to choose the uci section name (e.g. `lan`); omit it to let uapi assign a prefixed ULID. Create-only: changing it forces replacement.
- `metric` (Number) uci option metric.
- `weight` (Number) uci option weight.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a managed mwan3 member by its stable id.
terraform import uapi_mwan3_member.example <id>

# Importing an anonymous (unmanaged) section adopts it (renames to a stable id).
terraform import uapi_mwan3_member.example cfg0a1b2c
```
